system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dqt_tonghop_donhang_get5","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[DQT_TONGHOP_DONHANG_GET5](@maddh NVARCHAR(max), @chitiet nvarchar(200))
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @malo_nguyenlieu nvarchar(max);
	SELECT @malo_nguyenlieu = COALESCE(@malo_nguyenlieu + ', ', '') + malo_nguyenlieu
	FROM dqt_thongke_phoi 
	WHERE madonhang = @maddh
	GROUP BY malo_nguyenlieu

	SELECT B.masp, B.mact, B.stt, B.chitiet, 
		B.nguyenlieu, 
		COALESCE(B.dayy_tc, 0) AS dayy_tc, 
		COALESCE(B.rong_tc, 0) AS rong_tc, 
		COALESCE(B.dai_tc, 0) AS dai_tc, 
		COALESCE(B.soluong_tc, 0) AS soluong_tc, 
		B.dayy_sc, rong_sc = B.rong_tc + 1, dai_sc = ISNULL(NL.congdaiphoi, 0) + B.dai_tc,
		soluong = A.soluong * B.soluong_tc, 
		B.veneer_matchinh, B.veneer_matphu, 
		C.loaihang AS MC, D.loaihang AS MP, E.loaihang AS DC,
		NL.tilehaohut, NL.congdaiphoi, B.ghichu
	INTO #TONGHOP_CHITIET
	FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet A
		INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp = B.masp
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer C on B.veneer_matchinh = C.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer D on B.veneer_matphu = D.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer E on B.veneer_dan_canh = E.id
		LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham F ON B.masp = F.masp
		LEFT JOIN tr_nguyenlieu_gva NL ON B.id_nguyenlieu = NL.id
	WHERE maddh = @maddh AND A.chitiet = @chitiet
		--AND ISNULL(B.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0')
		AND A.active = 1
		AND B.mact <> '000'
		AND B.dayy_tc > 0
		AND A.chitiet LIKE 'W%'
	ORDER BY B.stt

	SELECT A.*, @malo_nguyenlieu AS malo_nguyenlieu,
		CASE
			WHEN A.dayy_tc > 0 AND A.rong_tc > 0 AND A.dai_tc > 0 THEN CONCAT(FORMAT(A.dayy_tc, '#,0.##'), ' * ', FORMAT(A.rong_tc, '#,0.##'), ' * ', FORMAT(A.dai_tc, '#,0.##'))
			ELSE ''
		END AS quycach,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.dai_tc > 0 AND A.dai_tc <= 999 THEN N'Ngắn'
			WHEN A.dai_tc >= 1000 AND A.dai_tc <= 1599 THEN N'Trung'
			WHEN A.dai_tc >= 1600 THEN N'Dài'
		END AS loaichitiet,
		ghichu2 = CONCAT_WS(' + ', IIF(LEN(A.ghichu) > 0, A.ghichu, NULL), N'Vnr mặt chính (' + A.MC + ')', N'Vnr mặt phụ (' + A.MP + ')',N'Vnr cạnh (' + A.DC + ')')
	FROM #TONGHOP_CHITIET A
	ORDER BY A.dayy_tc, A.rong_tc, A.dai_tc, A.nguyenlieu

DROP TABLE #TONGHOP_CHITIET;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
